hero.title: Design Your Modular Home in Minutes
hero.subtitle: AI-powered platform — place 3×3m modules on your land, visualize in 3D, get permit-ready drawings. Start free.

fast.title: Fast
fast.description: From blank canvas to permit-ready design in under 1 hour.

ai.title: AI-powered
ai.description: 15 AI render engines, Neufert-based consultant, intelligent suggestions.

compliant.title: EU-compliant
compliant.description: Built-in regulatory checks for Romania, Netherlands, Germany, France, Belgium.

cta.final: Start your modular home design today — 3 months Premium free during beta.

pricing.title: Simple, transparent pricing
pricing.subtitle: Start free. Upgrade when you need more.

beta.banner: Beta bonus: 3 months Premium free for all new accounts

signUp.title: Create your ModulCA account
signUp.name: Full name (optional)
signUp.disclosure: By signing up you agree to our Terms and Privacy Policy. You can download or delete your data at any time.

export.title: Download Your Data
export.description: Under GDPR Article 15 and 20, you have the right to receive all personal data we hold about you in a structured, machine-readable format (JSON).

delete.title: Delete Account
delete.description: Under GDPR Article 17, you have the right to request deletion. We offer a 30-day grace period after which data is permanently erased.
delete.confirm: Are you sure? This will cancel subscriptions and sign you out from all devices.
delete.success: Account scheduled for deletion. You have 30 days to restore by contacting privacy@modulca.eu. Signing out now...

banner.title: We value your privacy
banner.description: We use essential cookies for core functionality. With your consent, we also use analytics cookies to improve the platform.
